search.description: Search the codebase using Beacon hybrid semantic search
search.template: Use the search tool to search for: ${0}

reindex.description: Force a full re-index of the codebase from scratch
reindex.template: Use the reindex tool to force a full re-index (confirm=true)

index.description: Show a visual dashboard of the Beacon index (chunks, coverage, file list)
index.template: Use the index tool to show the index dashboard. If the user said 'files', pass files=true

status.description: Quick health check of the Beacon index
status.template: Use the status tool to show the index health check

config.description: View or modify Beacon configuration settings
config.template: Use the config tool. If the user provided a key and value, call set action; otherwise call view action. User input: ${0}

blacklist.description: Manage the Beacon blacklist (prevent indexing of specific directories)
blacklist.template: Use the blacklist tool. If the user provided a path, add it; otherwise list current blacklist. User input: ${0}

whitelist.description: Manage the Beacon whitelist (allow indexing even if matched by blacklist)
whitelist.template: Use the whitelist tool. If the user provided a path, add it; otherwise list current whitelist. User input: ${0}

performance.description: Measure and analyze Beacon search and indexing performance
performance.template: Use the performance tool with action=report to show a performance report

terminate-indexer.description: Kill a running Beacon index/sync operation immediately
terminate-indexer.template: Use the terminate-indexer tool to kill the running indexing operation
